# Mechanics Pass — Perks (Ch. 4) — 2026-04-26

This document tracks issues identified during the system audit of Chapter 4: Perks System.

---

## Pass 1 — Perk Clarity & Terminology

### Issue 1 — Living Curse DR Terminology
**Status:** Completed
**Problem:** *Living Curse* uses "+1 DR vs. death magic," which could be confused with Difficulty Rating.
**Recommended Fix:** Standardize to: "+1 die on all saves against death magic and entropic effects."

---

### Issue 2 — Spectral Fire Resource Standardization
**Status:** Completed
**Problem:** *Spectral Fire* mentions "1 Glyph Charge," which is not a standard resource.
**Recommended Fix:** Standardize to: "...regain 1 SE or 1 BP."

---

### Issue 3 — Corruption Tier Consistency
**Status:** Completed
**Problem:** Ensure all perks and thresholds use the unified tier names: Touched (1-2), Marked (3-6), Deeply Corrupted (7-10), Abyss-Bound (11-14), Lost (15).
**Recommended Fix:** Verify and update any inconsistent naming in Section 4.3.

---

### Issue 4 — Purification Method Alignment
**Status:** Completed
**Problem:** Section 4.4 purification table is missing the "Ritual Spell Removal" method added to Chapter 8.
**Recommended Fix:** Add "Ritual Spell" entry to the purification table in 4.4.

---

### Issue 5 — Success Terminology Audit
**Status:** Completed
**Problem:** Some perks might still use older "+1 success" language when "+1 die" is intended, or vice-versa.
**Recommended Fix:** Verify all Tier 1-4 perks for "die" vs "success" intent. (Already looks mostly good, but check *Abyssal Reflex*).
